Seed2.1-Pro scores 87.9, the best listed result, ahead of GPT-5.5 (84.9), Claude-4.7-Opus (82.7) and Gemini-3.1-Pro (67.3); confirmed in the accompanying prose ('On GDPval, Seed2.1-Pro achieves the best listed score at 87.9...').
